$comment: Resource-aware tier classification for the local catalog test harness. Run order: small first (pod scheduling + image pulls fastest), medium next, large last (multi-component apps that take longer + need more RAM). Tier filter is order-preserving inside the 'entries' array — that determines run order within each tier.

small.$comment: Sub-300 MiB RSS, fast image pulls, simple readiness. 24 entries.

medium.$comment: 300 MiB - 1 GiB or multi-component apps that bundle a DB. 12 entries.

large.$comment: >1 GiB or many components or very slow boot. 5 entries.
